hero.subtitle: Computer Science graduate with hands-on experience in customer service, telecom & Wi-Fi support, and PC/laptop setup. I bring a calm, professional approach to passenger assistance, front-desk operations, and technical troubleshooting.

about.headSubtitle: Versatile professional bridging customer-facing roles and IT support.
paragraphs: I'm a Computer Science & Engineering graduate from Shri Shankaracharya Institute of Professional Management and Technology, Raipur (C.G.). Over the past few years, I've worked across customer service, reception, and IT support roles — gaining hands-on experience in passenger assistance, front-desk operations, telecom & Wi-Fi setup, and computer hardware.

Whether it's making an airport guest feel welcomed or updating firmware on a network switch, I bring care, patience, and attention to detail to every task. I'm currently looking for opportunities where I can combine my technical foundation with my people skills — front-desk roles, customer service, or IT support positions where both sides of my experience add value.
about.quote: I enjoy working with people, solving practical problems, and keeping systems running smoothly.

education.school: Shri Shankaracharya Institute of Professional Management and Technology, Raipur, C.G.
education.description: A four-year programme covering core computer science, software fundamentals, and engineering practice — providing the technical foundation behind my hands-on IT support work.

certifications.intro: Continuous learning across data and productivity tools.

experience.headSubtitle: Hands-on experience across customer service and IT support roles.

items.shortDesc: Installed IP/analog phones and managed Wi-Fi coverage checks across client offices.
bullets: Installed IP and analog telephones at client offices per senior-engineer instructions.
Checked Wi-Fi network coverage by walking the site, testing signal strength and connectivity.
Performed basic health checks on Wi-Fi access points and reported low-signal or dead zones.
Updated firmware on 24-port switches (uploading .bin files & restarting) so senior engineers could complete configuration.

items.company: Global Flight Handling Service Pvt Ltd
items.shortDesc: Assisted passengers, handled inquiries, and made public announcements at the airport.
bullets: Greeted and assisted passengers in a friendly and professional manner.
Provided accurate information about flight schedules, boarding gates, and airport facilities.
Handled passenger inquiries, complaints, and special requests with patience and efficiency.
Communicated clearly with a diverse range of passengers and made public flight announcements.

items.shortDesc: Greeted visitors, managed calls, and supported office staff with scheduling.
bullets: Greeted and assisted visitors in a professional and courteous manner.
Answered and directed phone calls efficiently.
Managed appointment scheduling and calendar management.
Provided administrative support to office staff.

items.shortDesc: Assembled PCs, installed OS/drivers, and prepared systems for end-users.
bullets: Assembled and configured desktop computers and related hardware to spec.
Diagnosed and resolved common hardware issues to restore system functionality.
Installed operating systems and required drivers for stable performance.
Prepared systems for end-users by completing tests and checks before delivery.

skills.headSubtitle: A blend of people-skills and technical know-how.

items.title: Customer Service
items.desc: Passenger assistance, front-desk operations, warm professional communication.

items.title: Call & Reception
items.desc: Phone etiquette, visitor handling, lobby management, public announcements.

items.title: PC & Hardware
items.desc: Assembly, OS & driver installation, hands-on hardware troubleshooting.

items.title: Telecom & Wi-Fi
items.desc: IP/analog phone installs, Wi-Fi coverage checks, access-point health diagnostics.

items.title: Networking Basics
items.desc: Switch firmware updates, basic networking tasks, reporting to senior engineers.

items.title: Data & Reporting
items.desc: Cleaning, summarizing, and presenting data using analytical thinking.

items.title: MS Office Suite
items.desc: Excel, Word, and PowerPoint for everyday administrative work and reporting.

items.title: Communication
items.desc: Clear, friendly communication with diverse audiences and team members.

contact.headSubtitle: I'm open to opportunities in customer service, front-desk roles, and IT support. Send me a message — it lands directly in my Gmail inbox.
contact.formNote: Fill in the form and your message will be delivered straight to my Gmail inbox.

footer.blurb: Customer Service & IT Support Professional, based in India. Open to opportunities in front-desk, customer service, and technical support.
